特記事項: 【合併】英語IIｂ　８（経済学部）/英語IIIｂ　８（経済学部）
授業方法: Various methods including, pair and group work, listening exercises, dialog construction and presentation.Each class will consist of various speaking and listening skills, pair work and group activities.  Creating and writing theme-based dialogs and presenting them will also be included.

第1回:
【Startup Week】        【Flex Hours】          "Online class（On-demand format）"    《30 minutes》    Orientation, rules and regulations, class introduction, textbook introduction    Assignment:  Write a 200 plus word self-introduction essay and bring to class next week.

https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=ad18e90e-7703-46d6-9191-b3ee008528a8
Review of class introduction and rules, 45-minute preparation
第2回: 【Core Weeks 1】   "Face-to-face class"    《90 minutes》     group interview chart, short self-introductions, writing:  My family
Writing:  Hopes and aspirations for this school year
第3回: 【Core Weeks 2】     "Face-to-face class"     《90 minutes》　　　Text: pronunciation practice, listening comprehension drills, What is Japan famous for?
Dialog construction from the in-class material. One hour or more of study.
第4回: 【Core Weeks 3】   "Face-to-face class"     《90 minutes》   pair work information gap activity, key words - vocabulary building
Key words worksheet assignment. One hour of study.
第5回: 【Core Weeks 4】     "Face-to-face class"    《90 minutes》　　　　 personal news reports, country and people - country and currency, homework topic
Cultural communicative gap exercises. One hour or more of study.
第6回: 【Core Weeks 5】     "Face-to-face class"  《90 minutes》　　　　　 ８ short speech from homework assignment and feedback, pair work information gap activity
Rewriting the in-class short speech. One hour or more of out of class study.
第7回: 【Flex Hours】           "Online class（On-demand format）"　     《90 minutes》    See file on LUNA for posted lesson
第8回: 【Core Weeks 6】       "Face-to-face class"     《90 minutes》　　　personal news reports, environment vocabulary, short essay writing
Internet search of suggested topics. One hour of study.
第9回: 【Core Weeks 7】    "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》　　　　prepositions - rules and exceptions, class interview chart, expressing opinions
More preposition study worksheet assignment. One hour of out of class study.
第10回: 【Core Weeks 8】    "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》　　　 personal news reports, conversational dialog construction and presentation
Related conversational techniques. One hour of preparation.
第11回: 【Core Weeks 9】   "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》　Cultural Questions II, keeping the discussion going conversational techniques
Report: country to be announced. One hour or more of study.
第13回: 【Core Weeks 10】     "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》　　　personal news reports, pair work information gap activity, What do you say when...? homework: news topic assigned
Presentation preparation. One hour or more of out of class study.
第14回: 【Flex Hours】           "Online class（On-demand format）"　     《90 minutes》    See file on LUNA for posted lesson
Review and extend the meeting a foreigner dialog. One hour of study.　　Study for exam, one hour or more of study
第15回: 【Core Weeks 11】    "Face-to-face class"    《90 minutes》　　　Situational dialog construction and presentations, Meeting a Foreigner in Japan dialog、Exam explanation and practice
Preparation for final question and answer session. One hour of out of class study.
第16回: 【Core Weeks 12】      "Face-to-face class"    《90 minutes》    【Classes and examinations period】
トピック.授業外学習2: Students would be advised to do as much personal study outside the classroom as possible.  Also, to submit any homework assignments on time.

教科書/Required texts0: "English Please"  Joe M Jacobs   Marathon Publishing
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
